sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48211" key="qeolhyi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεοληψία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n48211.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">inspiration</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.763a</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="2" id="n48211.1" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">superstition</tr_>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">56e</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="3" id="n48211.2" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">frenzy, madness</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:210:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">210.4</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
